calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurie Shigekuni appeared by zoom for Richard M. Thompson.
Richard P. Thompson and Jovita Thompson (Decedent's Parents) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shigekuni stated that she re-noticed the petition and that the parents are here to say that they got notice and that they consent to the Son being appointed. Ms. Shigekuni also stated that she filed the notice about a week ago, that she put the notice in the Court's inbox and e-filed it, but that she did not re-publish it. In addition, Ms. Shigekuni stated that there is only about $15,000.00 in cash, that there are no creditors and asked the Court if it could decide it now. The Court reminded Counsel that there is also real property, noted that any creditors could have been following this through the initial publication and stated that it waives any defect in notice. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order signed in open Court). Richard M. Thompson is appointed as the Administrator with full authority. Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for August 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution or, a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed two weeks prior, or an appearance is required on that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
